The Pacers have been eliminated after their playoff run, marking the first team officially out[2]. This would impact prediction markets given earlier expectations around Tyrese Haliburton's recovery.

Lakers Lead Series 2-0 vs. Rockets | YES (Series Advantage) | HIGH confidence**
The Lakers have secured a 2-0 series lead against the Rockets, with Game 3 scheduled for April 24[4]. LeBron James delivered a strong performance in Game 1, and the team appears positioned to advance[5].

Thunder Advance to Conference Finals | YES (Series Won) | HIGH confidence**
Oklahoma City Thunder defeated the Timberwolves in their first-round series, advancing past Minnesota[4]. The Thunder are the top seed and have progressed as expected.
